new_finding_2026_05_23_0208.detail: SOL SHORT: 9 rules in feedback (7 SOL-SHORT-specific), but LLM engine coverage is 5x weaker than feedback system. Feedback blocks at 100%; LLM penalizes only -10pts at gate=20%. This means the LLM can still GENERATE high-confidence SOL SHORT signals that then get blocked later by the feedback layer. Dual-layer is inefficient — LLM should pre-filter aggressively to save API cost.
